summary: Two-bug-fix verification: (1) shadcn Radix Select dropdowns in ContactForm — all 3 (website-type, budget, timeline) open, list correct options in Radix portal, selecting updates trigger label and form state, POST /api/enquiries succeeds and success screen shows. (2) vercel.json at both /app and /app/frontend are valid JSON with framework=create-react-app, correct build/output/rewrites. `yarn build` in /app/frontend compiles successfully (Compiled successfully, 225.99 kB gzip main.js). Backend regression: 15/15 pytest cases passed (health, enquiries, admin login/list/stats/patch, blog list+single+404, robots, sitemap, chat SSE).
critical_code_review_comments: Select dropdown implementation is clean; SelectItem uses focus:bg-white/10 + data-[state=checked]:bg-cyan-500/20 giving proper dark theme with cyan highlight.
Both vercel.json files include a rewrite regex that correctly excludes /api and any path containing a dot, preserving robots.txt/sitemap.xml/static assets.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ContactForm now uses shadcn Radix Select — options render in a portal (document.body); tests must click the trigger then use role='option' selectors. Yarn build works locally proving Vercel CRA config is correct.
